summary: Completed testing of tree donation feature. All 8 features verified successfully. Order success page shows tree donation thank you message when ?tree=true param is present. Backend /api/admin/tree-donations endpoint returns correct structure with summary, daily breakdown, and order details. Admin Tree Donations page loads with all required components including summary cards, date filters, and empty state handling.

details: ✓ data-testid='tree-donation-thanks' element present
✓ Shows 'Thank You for Planting a Tree!' heading
✓ Shows 'Rs. 5 donation + Rs. 5 match = 1 tree' message
✓ TreePine icon displayed
✓ 'Your tree will be planted' in What's Next section
✓ Tree donation thank you message correctly hidden
✓ Tree planting message in What's Next correctly hidden
✓ Requires authentication (returns 401 without auth)
✓ Returns correct structure: summary, daily_breakdown, order_details, date_range
✓ Summary includes: total_customer_donations, total_addrika_match, total_combined, total_trees_funded, total_orders_with_donation, tree_cost
✓ tree_cost correctly set to 10 (₹5 customer + ₹5 Addrika)
✓ Accepts days parameter (7, 30, 90, 365)
✓ Accepts custom date range (start_date, end_date)
✓ Handles empty data gracefully
✓ OrderCreate model has tree_donation field with default=0
✓ tree_donation added to pricing object in payment session
✓ tree_donation amount added to final_total calculation
✓ Trees Funded card with TreePine icon
✓ Donors card with Users icon
✓ Customer Donations card with DollarSign icon
✓ Addrika Match card with Gift icon
✓ Total Impact card with TrendingUp icon
✓ 7 Days quick filter

✓ 90 Days quick filter
✓ 1 Year quick filter

✓ Daily Breakdown section (collapsible, shows when data exists)
✓ Invoice Details section with order numbers
✓ Export CSV button

✓ TreePine icon displayed
✓ Links to /admin/tree-donations

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Tree donation feature well-implemented across frontend and backend
✓ OrderCreate model correctly includes tree_donation: Optional[float] = 0
✓ Backend correctly adds tree_donation to final_total (line 353-355 in orders.py)
✓ Backend stores tree_donation in pricing object (line 474 in orders.py)
✓ Admin endpoint correctly calculates Addrika match (1:1 matching)
✓ Admin page handles empty state gracefully with informative message

test_credentials.note: Admin login requires 2FA - OTP sent to email

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tree donations data will be empty until real orders with donations are placed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tree donation feature is fully functional. Order success page shows thank you message when ?tree=true URL param is present. Admin Tree Donations page at /admin/tree-donations shows metrics with date filtering. Backend endpoint /api/admin/tree-donations requires admin authentication and returns summary, daily_breakdown, and order_details. Data will be empty until orders with tree_donation > 0 are placed.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working correctly as specified.
